name: portalgems-desktop
description: PortalGems desktop app (Phase 0 spike: Electron shell over wormhole-core)

scripts.build: NODE_PATH=./node_modules esbuild src/main.ts src/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outdir=dist --external:electron && NODE_PATH=./node_modules esbuild src/renderer/index.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer.js && npm run build:native
